description: Style NoteEvery item of clothing requires a different kind of innerwear to give the best comfort and the right look. enamor specialises in customised innerwear which will ensure a good overall look for you and lasting comfort throughout the day. And no need to compromise on the trendy look and style of your innerwear either, Enamor is your go to brand for the innerwear that takes care of all your requirements. Product DetailsGrey string bikini, has geometric trim lace string adoring the waist and double layered gussetMaterial and CareFabric: 100% cottonLace: 92% nylon and 8% spandexHand washDrip dry
